User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Time-Based Task Manager application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

externalId.description: Identifier for the user from an external authentication system.

email.description: The email address of the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the user account details were updated.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a single task created and managed by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Task entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this task.

name.description: The short title of the task.

notes.description: Optional detailed notes for the task.

status.description: The current completion status of the task.

priority.description: The priority level assigned to the task.

dueDate.description: The specific date for the task.

startTime.description: The scheduled time for the task (24h format HH:mm).

tab.description: The time-based category or tab the task belongs to.

owner.description: The person this task is assigned to.

createdBy.description: The person who created this task.

recurrence.description: The recurrence pattern for the task.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the task was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the task details were updated.

definition.description: Subcollection storing tasks specific to a particular user.
